ifc_item.name: IfcWall
ifc_item.definition: The wall represents a vertical construction that bounds or subdivides spaces. Wall are usually vertical, or nearly vertical, planar elements, often designed to bear structural loads. A wall is however not required to be load bearing.

original_text: should have the property FireRating in the set Pset_WallCommon with a value being one of REI30, REI60, REI90

ifc_item.name: FireRating
ifc_item.definition: Fire rating for the element. It is given according to the national fire safety classification.
